title: ctenopteris depressa
intro: Ctenopteris depressa, also known as the native fern of New Zealand, is a species of fern belonging to the family Woodsiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Ctenopteris depressa has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting against microbial infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for various health purposes.
